title: More Ancient Debris (10x)
description: Tweaks the world generation to get 10x more ancient debris spawn rates!
body:
[<center>![M_A_D_10x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8c202df0fd075d2e1f25ce081e40f76a46f14b6.png)</center>](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-ancient-debris-10x)

[<center>![Discord Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/FVH3GaMHJz)
[![GitHub Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Github-Button-64.png)](https://github.com/T1taniumF0rge-Industries-Inc/More-Ancient-Debris-10x)
[![Modrinth Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/shader/more-ancient-debris-10x)
[![Ko-fi Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Kofi-Button-64.png)</center>](https://ko-fi.com/titan1um)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

**This datapack tweaks the world generation to get 10x more ancient debris spawn rates!**

# 📥Installation:
This datapack tweaks the world generation to get 10x more ancient debris spawn rates! The pack is *made for* **all versions and snapshots between 1.18.2 and 1.21.11**.

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

⚠️**It is recommended to add the datapack by clicking on "Open Pack Folder" and then pasting the datapack inside that folder!** *Putting it in the* ```/datapacks``` *folder of your world or modpack also works but is less reliable...*

**Or, use the mod** and put it in your ```/mods``` folder!

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# ✨Features:
Tweaks the world generation to get 10x more ancient debris spawn rates!

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 📁Structure:
```
more_ancient_debris/
├── pack.mcmeta                           # Metadata file
├── data/minecraft/worldgen/placed_feature/
│   ├── ore_ancient_debris_large.json     # Tweaks for large Ancient Debris veins
│   └── ore_debris_small.json             # Tweaks for small Ancient Debris veins
```

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 🛠️Versioning:
This ressource pack uses the following versioning system:
- **Base pack:** standard versioning 
  - -> *e.g.* **v1.0, v2.4,...**

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# ⚙️Commands:
| **Command** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| ```/datapack list``` | Lists all loaded datapacks |
| ```/datapack info``` | Fetches details about the datapack |
| ```/datapack enable "file/more_ancient_debris"``` | Enables this datapack |
| ```/datapack disable "file/more_ancient_debris"``` | Disables this datapack |
| ```/reload``` | Reloads all datapacks |

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 💘 Support me!
To help me and make me develop more fascinating projects, share and recommend this datapack. Thank you so much!!!

You can also try my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Titan1um) or the projects me and Polr made [here](https://modrinth.com/organization/titan1um-x-polr)! :D
